query_intent: Compute February 2000 total sales per item (colors powder/green/cyan) across store, catalog, and web channels for addresses at GMT offset -6.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate February 2000 store sales by item id for selected item colors and GMT offset -6 addresses.
Aggregate February 2000 catalog sales by item id for selected item colors and GMT offset -6 billing addresses.
Aggregate February 2000 web sales by item id for selected item colors and GMT offset -6 billing addresses.
Union channel totals and sum to a cross-channel total_sales per item id.
